subject: A goblin knight in a red pointed cap riding atop a large bounding weasel-like creature, brandishing a small weapon
description: A small goblin warrior in a tall red cap and brown leather garb sits astride a long-bodied russet-furred weasel mid-leap. The goblin wields a small weapon and grins with mischievous menace. The mount's body stretches in a dynamic running pose with its tail trailing behind, evoking a low, fast charge. The background is a hazy reddish-brown wash suggesting dust kicked up at speed or a smoky battlefield, with no clear environmental detail — the focus is entirely on the rider-and-mount silhouette. Lighting is warm and ambient, dominated by reds and ochres.
foreground: goblin rider on a leaping weasel mount
background: hazy reddish-brown dust or smoke wash with no defined terrain
